data.title: Ripple co-founder moves millions of XRP to Coinbase amid all-time high potential, sparking speculation on selling.
data.description: Has Ripple co-founder and Executive Chairman Chris Larsen recently sold a substantial amount of XRP? Reports indicate that he transferred millions of dollars' worth of XRP to Coinbase.
US House gets enough votes to pass ‘Digital Asset Market Clarity Act of 2025.’ , voting continues

data.title: ExchangeRight appoints James Sabbatini as SVP of Pacific NW region, managing relationships in 6 states.
data.description: ExchangeRight, a prominent provider of diversified real estate REIT and DST investments in the United States, has appointed James Sabbatini as the senior vice president of the Pacific Northwest region. In this position, Sabbatini will oversee and enhance key partnerships in Washington, Oregon, Idaho, Montana, Wyoming, and Alaska. With more than 20 years of experience in investment management, Sabbatini will play a crucial role in the organization's strategic growth initiatives in the area.

data.title: CapRelo introduces AI-driven global mobility solutions for employee relocations, transforming HR processes.
data.description: A recently developed AI-powered tool by CapRelo is revolutionizing the way human resources mobility experts manage the relocation of employees. This innovative technology is set to enhance efficiency and effectiveness in the industry.
COLOMBIAN PRESIDENT PETRO TO VISIT HAITI ON FRIDAY - HAITI PM

data.title: Dow Jones index rises on surprise jobless claims and retail sales, Nvidia chipmaker TSMC also climbs on earnings.
data.description: On Thursday, the Dow Jones index experienced a significant increase following unexpected improvements in jobless claims and retail sales. TSMC, a leading chipmaker like Nvidia, saw a rise in its shares due to strong earnings. The stock market displayed positive movement today with the Dow climbing. Additionally, Nvidia hit a record high. Alongside, the Federal Reserve officials reiterated their firm stance on maintaining rates. This event was covered live and in detail by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Tamarack Resort announces jam-packed summer/fall 2025 event lineup in Idaho, featuring music, art, adventure with vibrant calendar.
data.description: Experience a vibrant summer and fall at Tamarack Resort, located in Idaho. The 2025 calendar promises a season full of music, art, adventure, and breathtaking mountain views. The resort is gearing up for an exciting time with a lineup of signature mountain festivals and new weekly traditions. With an array of activities planned, guests can enjoy an unforgettable experience in the heart of the mountains. Don't miss out on the chance to immerse yourself in everything Tamarack Resort has to offer this season.

data.title: Omnicom (OMC) gets approval for acquiring Interpublic (IPG) in Australia after ACCC review.arcy review.
data.description: In a recent announcement on July 17, 2025, Omnicom (NYSE: OMC) and Interpublic (NYSE: IPG) disclosed that the Australia Competition and Consumer Commission (ACCC) has given the green light for Omnicom's acquisition of Interpublic. This clearance from ACCC marks a significant step forward in the pending acquisition process. This approval contributes to the overall antitrust approval count, with the latest tally reaching a notable figure.

data.title: Liberty HealthShare earns GuideStar Gold Seal 4th year in a row, also receives Charity Navigator 4-Star Rating for 2025.
data.description: In Canton, Ohio, Liberty HealthShare® has once again achieved the prestigious GuideStar Gold Seal for the fourth consecutive year. Additionally, for the year 2025, they received a 4-star rating from Charity Navigator. Liberty HealthShare® stands out as the sole healthshare ministry to hold both the Gold Seal and a 4-star rating. This recognition solidifies their commitment to transparency and accountability in their operations.

data.title: Market Veep achieves Women-Owned Business Certification from WBENC, showcasing commitment to female leadership & representation.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, Market Veep, a prominent B2B lead generation agency based in Boston, was officially recognized for its founder's strong leadership and dedication to promoting women's representation in business. The agency has received certification affirming their commitment. This certification serves as a testament to Market Veep's position as a market leader in inbound marketing, emphasizing its focus on generating leads for businesses.

data.title: Ink Films to release Animation Mixtape, curated by Don Hertzfeldt, in Fall 2025. Theatrical debut by The Beverly Theater.
data.description: Ink Films, the theatrical distribution division of The Beverly Theater, has revealed that its first release, Animation Mixtape, will have an exclusive theatrical debut in Fall 2025. The announcement was made in Las Vegas on July 17, 2025. The film will be presented by Don Hertzfeldt, a two-time Academy Award nominee.

data.title: S&S Activewear partners with commonsku platform, offering full inventory of leading brands and styles.
data.description: The diverse collection of popular brands and styles offered by S&S Activewear is now accessible on commonsku in Bolingbrook, Illinois.

data.title: DreamPark opens 25,000 sq ft mixed-reality theme park in Seattle at West Canal Yards, leveraging XR tech. Specially equipped with Meta Quest headsets. Sneak Peek on July 18, Opening Day on July 19.
data.description: DreamPark, a renowned creator of the world's largest downloadable theme park, has officially launched its new location at Seattle's West Canal Yards. Covering an expansive 25,000 square feet, this immersive mixed-reality experience utilizes cutting-edge XR technology via Meta Quest headsets to transform the physical world into a captivating free-roam adventure game. DreamPark caters to a wide audience, from children to corporate groups, offering a digital realm brought to reality along the Ballard waterfront. A special Sneak Peek event is scheduled for Friday, July 18th from 4 to 6 pm, with the grand Opening Day following on Saturday, July 19th.

data.title: ATN set to release Q2 2025 financial results on August 7, 2025, hosting conference call on August 8, 2025 at 10:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: In Beverly, Massachusetts, on July 17, 2025, ATN International, Inc. ("ATN"), traded on Nasdaq as ATNI, revealed plans to disclose its second quarter 2025 financial outcomes on August 7, 2025, post-market closure. The renowned provider of digital infrastructure and communication services will convene a conference call to deliberate on these results at 10:00 a.m. ET on August 8, 2025.

data.title: Latest homeless count in L.A. disputed by Housing Is A Human Right group, questioning accuracy.
data.description: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to 3.9%. This marks a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 4.2%. The economy also added 250,000 new jobs in the same period, showcasing robust growth in the job market. Additionally, the stock market saw a notable increase, with the major indexes rising by 2-3% in response to the positive economic data. Experts are optimistic about the upward trend and predict continued growth in the coming months.

data.title: Donegal Group Inc. declares quarterly dividend of $0.1825 per share for Class A and $0.165 per share for Class B.
data.description: Marietta, Pennsylvania - Donegal Group Inc. announced that their board of directors has approved a regular quarterly cash dividend for the quarter ending on August 15, 2025. Stockholders as of the record date on August 1, 2025, will be eligible to receive dividends. The dividend amounts to $0.1825 per share for Class A common stock and $0.165 per share for Class B common stock. Donegal Group Inc. is listed on NASDAQ under ticker symbols DGICA and DGICB.
